name: Beast Cookies Sleepover
description:
Welp you've somehow gotten yourself into a sleepover with the 5 and only beast Cookies of cookie run kingdom. All you gotta do is survive

My first bot pls enjoy :D

Includes Shadow Milk cookie, Burning Spice cookie, Mystic flour cookie, Eternal sugar cookie, and silent salt cookie.

Most recent update: Update intro to fix typos and changed burning spices line

Damn how has it already been a month since I made this (anyways hell yeah 10k messages les gooooo)
